intro: Lazarus Group, UNC6692, and APT37 (ScarCruft, InkySquid) were the most frequently cited threat actors across 50 articles on social-engineering tactics published between April 8 and April 28, 2026. The coverage, which included 38 high-severity reports, primarily targeted the technology, cryptocurrency, financial services, and hospitality sectors. Affected regions spanned North America, Europe, and Global, with specific mentions of the United States and Canada. One informational piece rounded out the mix.
